nasb.text: They took away the pots, the shovels, the snuffers, the spoons, and all the bronze vessels which were used in temple service.

esv.text: And they took away the pots and the shovels and the snuffers and the dishes for incense and all the vessels of bronze used in the temple service,

cnv.text: 他們又把鍋、鏟子、燭剪、碟子和敬拜用的一切銅器都拿去了。

ccb.text: 并带走了盆、铲、蜡剪、碟子及一切献祭用的铜器。
